title: Citrusy Crumbly British Filo Pastry Crock
description: This dairy-free-friendly citrusy crumbly pastry dish is perfect for a hangover cure with its tender filo crust and zesty topping.

ingredients.name: Julienned Citrus Zest (e.g. Orange or Lemon)
Coconut Cream
ingredients.notes: Use coconut milk for a dairy-free alternative

ingredients.name: Filo-Crumble Ingredients
ingredients.notes: Includes sugars, spices (optional), and nuts as per personal preference

instructions: Brush the filo pastry sheets with olive oil on both sides.
Spread a thin layer of coconut cream over each sheet, ensuring all surfaces are covered.
Sprinkle julienned citrus zest evenly across the top of the coconut cream layer.
In a separate bowl, mix together your preferred crumble ingredients (sugars, spices, and nuts if using).
Carefully place the filo sheets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Place the crumble mixture in dollops over the top of the citrus zest.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving. Optionally, garnish with fresh fruit slices or mint leaves if desired.
